mapper.select: SELECT id, code, title, content, source, DATE_FORMAT(publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publish_date, news_type, sentiment_score, event_tag, url FROM stock_news WHERE code = #{code} AND event_tag LIKE CONCAT(#{eventTag}, '%') ORDER BY publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'positive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as positive_count, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'negative' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negative_count, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'neutral' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as neutral_count, MAX(publish_date) as latest_date FROM stock_news WHERE code = #{code}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'positive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as positive_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'negative' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negative_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN event_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tagged_30d FROM stock_news WHERE code = #{code} AND publish_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT title, news_type, sentiment_score, event_tag, DATE_FORMAT(publish_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as publish_date FROM stock_news WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
